motion_library: framer-motion ^12.39.0 (already installed in apps/web/package.json). Used ONLY for scroll-into-view entrance reveals + hero mount stagger + FAQ accordion height transition. All hover/press/underline effects via Tailwind utilities. All framer animations honor useReducedMotion / prefers-reduced-motion.
global_acceptance: All files compile with apps/web tsconfig (yarn tsc --noEmit passes for the apps/web project)
No inline hex colors anywhere — only Bodhi tokens from apps/web/src/app/globals.css (bg-brand-*, bg-surface-*, text-text-*, border-border-*, mint-*)
No clamp() — typography via text-h1..h5 / text-subtext-1..3 / text-body-sm / text-mini tokens
Mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px) viewports both render per 02_decomposition.json responsive_strategy
All framer-motion usage honors useReducedMotion / prefers-reduced-motion (zero-duration / zero-distance fallback variants when reduced)

parallel_groups_legend.A: Data module — blocks the route page and any consumer.
parallel_groups_legend.B: Five independent component/section extensions — all touch different files, safe to run in parallel.
parallel_groups_legend.C: One brand-new section file — depends on the SyllabusCard extension (T4) from group B.
parallel_groups_legend.D: Route page + optional demo page wiring — depends on A, B, C.

spec.purpose: Single typed data module for the Aerial Yoga Course detail page. Drives every section on the page; designed so future YTT courses can reuse the same component tree.

shape.hero: { titleLead:'Aerial Yoga', titleAccent:'Course', subtitle, meta:CourseHeroMeta[4] (calendar/location/clock/globe + label), ctaLabel:'Reserve Your Spot Now', ctaHref:'/enquire?course=aerial-yoga', heroImage:'/courses/aerial-yoga/hero.jpg' }
shape.overview: { eyebrow:'OVERVIEW', heading:'Elevate Your Practice — Literally', paragraphs:string[2] }
shape.highlights: { eyebrow:'HIGHLIGHTS', heading:"What You'll Gain", items:Array<{icon,title,body}>[6] with icon keys feather|spine|smile|leaf|rocket|people }
shape.instructors: { eyebrow:'YOUR GUIDE', heading:"Meet Your Instructor's", people:Array<{name,role,image,slug?}>[4] }
shape.faqs: { eyebrow:'FAQ', heading:'Frequently Asked Questions', items:Array<{question,answer,defaultOpen?}>[4] — first defaultOpen:true }
shape.relatedCourses: { eyebrow:'TOP POPULAR YOGA COURSE', heading:'Lead to more courses from us', subhead, courses:Array<{title,duration,format,language,instructor,image,href}>[3] }
shape.closingCta: { headingLead:'Begin where', headingAccent:'you are.', subhead, primaryCta:{label:'Try a class, free', href:'/try'}, cards:Array<{title,body,ctaLabel,ctaHref}>[3] (Free Trial → /free-trial, Speak to us → /contact, Take a Guided Path → /assessment) }

imports_from_existing_types: CourseSectionNavItem from @/components/sections/course-section-nav (if exported; else local minimal type)

acceptance_criteria: Exports `aerialYogaCourse` as a const and `AerialYogaCourse` as a TypeScript type
All content strings match the verbatim copy in 02_decomposition.json (sections.*.components.*.props)
Breadcrumb uses BreadcrumbItem[] shape from apps/web/src/components/ui/breadcrumb.ts (not a flat string)

Hrefs in the module use the real Next routes — '/', '/courses', '/enquire?course=aerial-yoga', '/try', '/free-trial', '/contact', '/assessment'; the 8 unresolved hrefs flagged in 02_interactions.json are listed in a top-of-file comment so visual-qa can verify during QA
File contains zero JSX, zero tokens, zero motion — pure data + types
tasks.notes: Mirrors the data-driven pattern of apps/web/src/app/pre-recorded-courses/[slug]/page.tsx (which imports from ../courses). Keeping this file static (not dynamic [slug]) for now since only one YTT course is being built; if a second is added, lift to a courses registry.

spec.purpose: Add mount-time staggered entrance motion + accept BreadcrumbItem[] for the breadcrumb prop.
spec.existing_signature_notes: Currently a server component. Accepts breadcrumb as a single string today. Renders bg-brand-lite, 2-col on lg, 4 meta cards.
changes: Add 'use client' at top (required for framer-motion + useReducedMotion)
Widen `breadcrumb` prop type from `string` to `string | BreadcrumbItem[]` (backward compatible). When array, render via existing Breadcrumb primitive (apps/web/src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx)
Wrap breadcrumb, title-line-1, title-line-2, subtitle, meta-row, cta, hero-image in motion.div using fade-in-up / fade-in primitives and delays from interaction_block
Meta row uses parent variants { staggerChildren:0.08, delayChildren:0.1 }; each CourseMetaChip wrapped in motion.li (or motion.div) child variant
Honor useReducedMotion: when reduced, initial = animate so no motion plays

acceptance_criteria: Component is a Client Component ('use client' directive present)
Existing string-form breadcrumb still renders correctly (backward compatible)
When breadcrumb is BreadcrumbItem[], renders using the existing Breadcrumb primitive and links Home → '/' and 'Yoga courses' → '/courses'

On mount in a fresh viewport: breadcrumb (0ms) → title line 1 (100ms) → title line 2 (200ms) → body (300ms) → meta row children stagger (400ms + 80ms each) → CTA (550ms) → hero image fade-in (200ms over 600ms) using fade-in-up (opacity 0→1, y 12→0, 400ms easeOut)
useReducedMotion: when true, every animated element resolves to opacity:1 y:0 with transition duration 0
CTA links to /enquire?course=aerial-yoga via next/link; Tailwind pill-press classes applied to CTA
No inline hex; no clamp(); renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: Per scout: existing component is a server component with no motion — this extension adds ~30 lines of framer wrappers. Per interactions unresolved: if desktop hides the CTA via `hidden lg:inline-flex`, the motion still fires on the hidden element which is fine.

spec.purpose: Extend ICON_RESOLVER to cover Aerial Yoga icon keys, add an `id` prop for the #highlights anchor, and add scroll-into-view stagger reveal.
changes: Add missing icon keys to ICON_RESOLVER: feather→lucide-react Feather, spine→Bone (or Activity), smile→Smile, rocket→Rocket. Existing keys (yoga, align-center, strength, leaf, technology, people) remain.
Add `id?: string` prop. When provided, applied to root <section> together with className 'scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24'.
Convert to client component if not already; wrap inline section header in motion.div (fade-in-up, whileInView, viewport once:true amount:0.15)
Wrap grid in motion.ul (or motion.div) with parent variants { staggerChildren:0.08, delayChildren:0.15 }; each HighlightCard wrapped in motion.li with fade-in-up child variants
Honor useReducedMotion (zero-duration / zero-distance fallback)

acceptance_criteria: ICON_RESOLVER resolves all 6 Aerial Yoga keys (feather, spine, smile, leaf, rocket, people) without falling through to a default placeholder
When `id='highlights'` is passed, root <section> has id='highlights' AND className includes 'scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24'
On scroll-into-view (~15% visible, once): section header fades-in-up at 0ms, then grid children stagger fade-in-up starting at 150ms with 80ms gaps
Existing call sites of HighlightsSection still render (icon keys, items[], eyebrow, heading unchanged)
useReducedMotion respected; no inline hex; no clamp(); renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: Scout flagged this as 'extend'. The icon coverage and the id-prop are the two new surfaces. Tailwind hover-lift-card class is added on the HighlightCard wrapper li to avoid touching HighlightCard internals.

spec.purpose: Add module-number prop and remove fixed width so the card can flex inside a 3-col grid.
changes: Add optional prop `n?: string` (e.g., '01'). When provided, render as a small label above the title: {n}
Remove `w-[294px]` and replace with `w-full` so the parent grid column controls width
Add Tailwind hover-lift-card utility (transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg) to the root surface; respect prefers-reduced-motion (motion-safe: prefix is fine)
Preserve current bg-surface-1 + border-border-2 + rounded-lg surface treatment

acceptance_criteria: Existing call sites that don't pass `n` continue to render with no module number (backward compatible)
When `n='01'` passed, label renders above title in text-mini uppercase tracking-widest text-text-brand (token only, no inline color)
Card root is `w-full` — no remaining `w-[294px]`
Hover on a non-reduced-motion device translates the card up ~4px and increases shadow over 300ms; respects motion-reduce media query (auto via Tailwind motion-safe:)
No inline hex; renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: Existing scroller use-case is unaffected because the scroller sets its own column width via the parent.

spec.purpose: Add a `layout: 'scroller' | 'grid'` variant and scroll-into-view stagger reveal. Wrap each InstructorCard with Next <Link href={`/trainers/${slug}`}> when slug is provided.
changes: Add `layout?: 'scroller' | 'grid'` prop, default 'scroller' (backward compatible)
When layout='grid': drop ScrollNextButton, switch the list container className to 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6'

Convert to client component if needed; wrap header in motion.div (fade-in-up whileInView once:true amount:0.2); wrap list container in motion.ul with variants { staggerChildren:0.08, delayChildren:0.15 }; wrap each InstructorCard in motion.li with fade-in-up child variants
Accept optional `slug` on each instructor item; when present, wrap the card in Next <Link href={`/trainers/${slug}`}>; otherwise render the card directly
Honor useReducedMotion

actions.rationale: Slug derived from name; route may not yet exist. If unresolved at QA time, render as non-link static card.

acceptance_criteria: Existing scroller call sites still render (layout defaults to 'scroller', ScrollNextButton still visible)
When layout='grid', renders a grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 layout (2x2 at lg) with no ScrollNextButton
On scroll-into-view (20% threshold, once): header fades-in-up first, then list children stagger every 80ms
When an instructor item has a `slug`, that card is wrapped in a Next <Link> pointing to /trainers/<slug>; without slug, renders as a non-link card
useReducedMotion respected; no inline hex; renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: Per scout warning + interactions unresolved: /trainers/[slug] route may not exist. Builder should still wire the Link; visual-qa to verify whether it 404s and downgrade to a non-link card if necessary.

spec.purpose: Replace hard show/hide answer body with framer-motion height auto<->0 + opacity transition. Optionally swap Plus/Minus for a single ChevronDown that rotates.
changes: Convert to client component (if not already)

Wrap conditional `{open && answer &&

...

}` in +
Keep existing Plus/Minus icon swap OR replace with single ChevronDown using `transition-transform duration-300 ease-out` + conditional `rotate-180` className when open (Tailwind, no framer)
Honor useReducedMotion: when reduced, set transition duration to 0 so the answer toggles instantly without height animation

acceptance_criteria: Clicking trigger toggles aria-expanded and animates the answer body from height:0 to height:auto over 300ms easeOut (and reverse)
First item with defaultOpen=true renders expanded on mount without playing the open animation
Chevron (or Plus/Minus) visually indicates state — if chevron is used, rotates 180deg over 300ms when open
useReducedMotion: with reduced-motion preference, height transition runs at duration 0 (instant)
Existing FaqItem prop shape ({question, answer, defaultOpen?}) is preserved — no breaking changes to FaqSection callers
Trigger button uses Tailwind press-scale (active:scale-[0.98]); no inline hex; renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: Scout explicitly confirms: shadcn Accordion is NOT installed, so the framer-motion path is the only path. Don't double-animate.

spec.purpose: New section for the 3x2 grid of 6 SyllabusCards. CurriculumSection (horizontal scroller) is not a fit; this is the explicit Figma desktop authored layout.
imports: SyllabusCard from @/components/ui/syllabus-card (the T4-extended version with `n` prop)

props_shape.heading: string (default 'Course Syllabus')
props_shape.modules: Array<{ n: string; title: string; body: string }>

layout_notes: Root <section> with id (when provided), className 'scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24 bg-background py-20 lg:py-28'
Inline section header: text-mini eyebrow + text-h2 heading (matches sibling sections like Curriculum/Eligibility — NOT the SectionHeader primitive, per scout)
Grid: 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 lg:gap-5'
Each module rendered via <SyllabusCard n={m.n} title={m.title} body={m.body} /> wrapped in motion.div child variants

acceptance_criteria: File is a Client Component using framer-motion + useReducedMotion
Renders id='curriculum' (when passed) with scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24 on the root <section>
Renders header (eyebrow text-mini + heading text-h2) using only Bodhi tokens — no inline hex
Renders a 1-col grid at mobile, 2-col at sm, 3-col at lg, with the 6 modules in author order; each card shows its module number (T4's `n` prop)
On scroll-into-view (15% threshold, once): header fades-in-up at 0ms, grid children stagger fade-in-up starting at 150ms with 80ms gaps
useReducedMotion respected (all motion resolves to final state with duration 0)
Renders correctly at 390 (single column) and 1920 (3 columns wide)
tasks.notes: Depends on T4 so that SyllabusCard accepts `n` and is `w-full`. Sibling pattern: see apps/web/src/components/sections/highlights-section.tsx for header layout + motion shape.

spec.purpose: Assemble the full Aerial Yoga Course detail page from existing + extended sections, reading content from apps/web/src/data/aerial-yoga-course.ts.
assembly_order: <CourseOverviewSection id='overview' className='scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24' ... /> (wrap in <section id='overview'> if the component doesn't forward id)
<ClosingCtaSection theme='dark' headingLead={...} headingAccent={...} subhead={...} primaryCta={...} cards={aerialYogaCourse.closingCta.cards} />
spec.metadata_export: export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'Aerial Yoga Course | Bodhi School of Yoga', description: aerialYogaCourse.hero.subtitle }

interaction_block.global_behavior: scroll-smooth on <html> (Tailwind 'scroll-smooth' class on <html> in apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx — verify; add if missing); scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24 on every anchored section. CourseSectionNav's existing IntersectionObserver handles active-tab updates.

acceptance_criteria: Route `/courses/aerial-yoga` renders without runtime errors in `next dev`
Page assembly order matches the order in 02_codebase_scout.json page_assembly_hint.shape

All five tab anchors (#overview, #highlights, #curriculum, #eligibility, #faq) exist as id attributes in the DOM and have scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24 so the sticky tab bar doesn't cover the heading on jump
Clicking any tab smooth-scrolls to its target section (verify in browser; uses scroll-smooth + scroll-mt)
ClosingCtaSection's `cards` prop receives the 3 CTA cards from the data module (Free Trial → /free-trial, Speak to us → /contact, Take a Guided Path → /assessment)
metadata.title and metadata.description exported
No inline hex; no clamp(); renders correctly at 390 (mobile, ~6885px tall) and 1920 (desktop, ~5390px tall) per 02_decomposition.json viewport
tasks.notes: Mirrors the structure of apps/web/src/app/pre-recorded-courses/[slug]/page.tsx but as a static (non-dynamic) route. Section id wrapping: if a section component does not forward an `id` prop, wrap the call with `<section id='...' className='scroll-mt-20 lg:scroll-mt-24'>...</section>`. Per scout warning #7, this is the agreed fallback.

spec.purpose: Stable demo route for visual-qa screenshotting. Renders the same composition as the real route. Since /courses/aerial-yoga is itself a static, parameter-free route, this page exists only as a harness-convention alias.
spec.implementation: Re-export the default page component from /courses/aerial-yoga: `export { default, metadata } from '../../courses/aerial-yoga/page';` (Next 15 supports re-exporting page defaults; if not, re-render via a thin wrapper component). No new data, no new motion.

acceptance_criteria: Route `/demo/aerial-yoga` renders identically to `/courses/aerial-yoga`
No duplicated content/data — implementation re-exports or thin-wraps the canonical page
Renders correctly at 390 and 1920
tasks.notes: OPTIONAL — if the orchestrator/visual-qa is happy screenshotting /courses/aerial-yoga directly, T9 can be skipped. Listed here for harness convention compliance ('Always add a demo_page entry').

demo_page.purpose: visual-qa screenshot target. Re-exports /courses/aerial-yoga since the real route is already static and parameter-free.
